parents.subject: LU-9648 ptlrpc: Add kernel doc style for ptlrpc (23)

commit.subject: LU-19770 llite: split ll_dir_ioctl into smaller chunks
commit.message:
LU-19770 llite: split ll_dir_ioctl into smaller chunks

Currently the function is over 900 lines long.
Use claude code + minimax 2.1 model to split it into parts.

Let's see how this one fares.

Change-Id: Ib2ccf81b94936f7825a42695689dd9f07bc8f10d
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
